title: DevTooltips
body:
*This mod has not been updated since 2015. I've put it up on Modrinth for archival purposes.*

This is a small mod that adds various tooltips to help addon developers.
![Short tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QcS0rDAB/images/e9ade5c60bcbcf5478960e00e6fd6beec1ffdf79.png)
![Detailed tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QcS0rDAB/images/0a33f5a9f620bffa08797a6dac28dff71a4be8d5.png)
